sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel movement data documented for this shmup

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Selection
special_mechanics.description: Player chooses between helicopter or jeep at start of game; defines movement and attack patterns throughout level

special_mechanics.name: Scrolling Shooter Movement
special_mechanics.description: 2D vertically scrolling shooter with constrained player movement within screen bounds during auto-scroll

special_mechanics.name: Shield Power-ups
special_mechanics.description: Dropped by certain enemies; can be picked up for temporary invincibility or detonated to clear screen

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative data only. This is a shoot-em-up (shmup) focused on arcade action rather than platformer physics. No specific movement parameters, gravity, or sub-pixel system data are documented in available sources. Gameplay centers on vehicle selection (helicopter or jeep) and combat mechanics rather than precise movement physics.
